_doc: Phase-2 retroactive demo for the VERILOG track. Loads as an empty scene (zero components, zero wires). Click VERILOG in the bottom toolbar to download circuit.v — the export pipeline (validate → fromCircuit → toVerilog, all of Phase 1+2) emits a clean empty `module top();` skeleton. This is what every later phase builds on; subsequent demos in this tab will exercise the Phase 3+ translators as they land.
